intent: We are building a Mac Consensus Dev Agent that will use consensus AI to develop high quality software. Use all the documents in the local repo to determine the architecture. You should apply Max impl_files per PR: 8–10. Beyond that, split into multiple PRs. Max acceptance criteria: 8–10. More than that is a scope problem.
scope_statement:
Build the complete Crafted Dev Agent — a native macOS two-process AI coding agent comprising a Swift/SwiftUI shell (UI, Touch ID, Keychain, XPC) and a Python backend (consensus engine, build pipeline, GitHub integration, document store, multi-agent coordination, holistic review, TRD workflow, recovery/state management, CI pipeline, self-healing). The system is fully specified across 16 TRDs (TRD-1 through TRD-17) plus supporting documents. This scope encompasses all subsystems: the macOS application shell, consensus engine with dual-LLM parallel generation, confidence-gated build pipeline with pr_type routing, multi-agent build ledger, GitHub integration layer, holistic code review, TRD development workflow (FOUNDER/ENGINEER/CONSULTANT modes), UI/UX design system with health dashboard, Mac CI runner infrastructure, document store with FAISS vector retrieval, security threat model controls, backend runtime startup/shutdown, recovery and state management with build memory and build rules, code quality CI pipeline, and self-healing observability loop. Gaps in TRD-18 (Crafted Connect), Figma pipeline internals, EmailNotifier, WebhookReceiver, and ConsensusEngine.generate_single() will be resolved via the PRD process using best practices during build execution.

Clarifications:
  - Use the PRD process to resolve any issues using best practices.
  - Use the PRD process to resolve any issues using best practices.
  - Use the PRD process to resolve any issues using best practices.
  - Use the PRD process to resolve any issues using best practices.
  - Use the PRD process to resolve any issues using best practices.

Operator on 'Given the massive scope (16+ TRDs, Swift + Python, ~60 sourc':
full scope in a single PRD planning cycle

Operator on 'For the five identified gaps (Crafted Connect SDK, Figma bac':
generate specification PRDs first

Operator on 'Should the initial build target a specific milestone (e.g., ':
complete the complete system. Select teh most elegant order to develop the product and the code

Operator on 'The current repo already has src/ files (agent.py, build_dir':
select the best solution

prd_plan.title: Foundational Architecture, Repository Alignment, and Build Strategy
Gap Specification Pack: Crafted Connect, Figma Pipeline Internals, EmailNotifier, WebhookReceiver, and ConsensusEngine.generate_single()
Security and Trust Boundary Implementation Framework
Backend Runtime Lifecycle: Startup, Handshake, Command Routing, Degraded-State, and Shutdown
Swift Shell Core: App Lifecycle, Authentication, Keychain, XPC Bridge, and Process Management
Document Store, FAISS Vector Retrieval, and Context Integrity Pipeline
Consensus Engine and Dual-Provider Orchestration
GitHub Integration Layer, Repository Bootstrap, and CI Status Services
Build Pipeline Orchestration: Scope-to-PR Execution Engine
Recovery, State Management, Build Memory, Build Rules, and Context Persistence
Code Quality Pipeline, Local Validation Gates, and GitHub Actions Workflow Generation
Multi-Agent Coordination, Build Ledger, and Team Knowledge Sharing
Holistic Code Review Workflow and Fix PR Generation
macOS UI Foundation: Build Stream, Navigation, Context Panel, and Native App Experience
TRD Development Workflow: FOUNDER, ENGINEER, and CONSULTANT Modes
Self-Healing Observability, Detection, Classification, and Autonomous Remediation Engine
Health Dashboard, Diagnosis UX, Remediation Stream, and In-App Issue Reporting
Figma-to-Build Design Ingestion and Sketch Interpretation Flow
Mac CI Runner Infrastructure, Swift Validation, Signing, Notarization, and Release Artifacts
End-to-End System Validation, EmailNotifier Implementation, Operational Runbook, and Release Readiness
